name: implexa
description: the skill graph for AI work — record any workflow once via demonstration, get a portable agentskills.io-compliant SKILL.md that runs in Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Hermes, and 30+ more agents. Share with your team (private, org, or public scopes), fork from a public library, and track outcome attribution to see which skills actually moved deals/hires/saves.

interface.shortDescription: the skill graph for AI work
